tool.name: glassdoor_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple job queries on Glassdoor in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling glassdoor_search_jobs multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'software engineer,product manager,data scientist'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated job search queries (e.g. 'software engineer,product manager,data scientist')
